name: Faceless Void
description: From a place beyond time, and time beyond counting. Darkterror, the Faceless Void Darkterror the Faceless Void is a visitor from Claszureme, a realm outside of time. It remains a mystery why this being from another dimension believes the struggle for the Nemesis Stones is worth entering our physical plane, but apparently an upset in the balance of power in this world has repercussions in adjacent dimensions. Time means nothing to Darkterror, except as a way to thwart his foes and aid his allies. His long-view of the cosmos has given him a remote, disconnected quality, although in battle he is quite capable of making it personal.

abilities.name: Distortion Field
abilities.description: Grants an incoming ranged attack projectile slow aura that affects all allied heroes within the radius. The incoming ranged attack projectile slow only applies when the projectile itself is within the proximity radius.

abilities.name: Backtrack
abilities.description: Faceless Void has a chance to avoid damage entirely.

abilities.name: Time Walk
abilities.description: Rushes to a target location while healing up from any damage taken in the last few seconds. Applies Time Lock of the corresponding level onto all units at the landing destination.

abilities.name: Time Dilation
abilities.description: The debuff first applies one instance of all ability components, then additionally applies a movement speed slow, attack speed slow, and deals damage per second per ability currently on cooldown. Increases the attack speed slow and movement speed slow applied.

abilities.name: Time Lock
abilities.description: Adds a chance for an attack to lock an enemy unit in time while attacking it a second time.

abilities.name: Chronosphere
abilities.description: When a rift opens to Claszureme, all poor souls caught within will likely never return.
